paper-compile.prompt:
Read all Paper A files: docs/paper-a-abstract.md, docs/paper-a-intro-rw.md, docs/paper-a-method.md, docs/paper-a-results.md, docs/paper-a-discussion.md, docs/paper-a-outline.md, docs/paper-a-draft.md.

Compile into a single file: docs/paper-a-full.md

Structure: Title + Abstract + §1-5 + References summary.
Count words, list all [TODO]/[PENDING] at the end.
Do NOT invent data. Do NOT create COMPLETED.txt.
git add -A && git commit -m 'docs: compile full Paper A draft'

weekly-report.prompt:
Generate weekly report for 2026-03-13 to 2026-03-19.

Read: git log --oneline --since=2026-03-13, memory/2026-03-18.md, memory/2026-03-19.md, memory/task-board.md, docs/paper-a-status.md.

Write: memory/weekly-report-2026-03-19.md (<100 lines).
Sections: 本週成果, 系統升級, 研究進展, 下週計劃, Blockers.

Do NOT create COMPLETED.txt.
git add -A && git commit -m 'docs: weekly report 2026-03-19'
